JASON N. WOLFORD, ESQ. WOLFORD WAYNE LLP 415-649-6203 jason@wolford-wayne.com Attorneys for Plaintiffs DISCOVERY VICTOR POGACAR and AWET HAILEMELECOT
LUANNE RUTHERFORD, ESQ. WILSON ELSER MOSKOWITZ EDELMAN & DICKER LLP (415) 433-0990 luanne.rutherford@wilsonelser.com Attorney for Defendants, GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT and 4540 CALIFORNIA STREET, LLC

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tenative ruling as modified:

PLAINTIFF VICTOR POGACAR, AWET HAILEMELECOT Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendants' Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions

Plaintiffs' motion to compel is granted Defendants GreenTree Property Management and 4540 California Street, LLC ("Defendants") shall provide verified responses and documents, without objections except as to privilege, to Plaintiffs' Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, and Request For Production of Documents, Set One to Defendants. Sanctions are denied in the interests of justice. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance wiht CRC 3.1312 and e-mail it to Judge Pro Tem James Fleming at jameshfleming@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
